Name: WEAPON_STATS_AFFECT_PARAM
Description: Defines reinforcement scaling multipliers that modify how weapon damage and status effects are affected by attributes at each upgrade tier.

Fields.Name: Base Value Scaling
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to the weapon's base attack value during reinforcement calculations.

Fields.Name: Menu Base Value Scaling
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to the displayed base attack value in menus.

Fields.Name: Physical Strength Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to physical damage scaling from Strength. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Physical Dexterity Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to physical damage scaling from Dexterity. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Magic Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to magic damage scaling. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Lightning Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to lightning damage scaling. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Fire Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to fire damage scaling. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Dark Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to dark damage scaling. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Poison Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to poison buildup scaling. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Bleed Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to bleed buildup scaling. Tier 0.

Fields.Name: Physical Enhancted Scaling: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to physical damage scaling derived from enchanted attribute. Tier 0.
